summary: The current-head architecture surface preserves the run-session ownership boundary and staged delivery protocol. The CLI remains the outer composition root, neither guarded-run-session nor one-command-pr-ready-closure calls back into src/cli.js, autonomous workflow state can reach pr_ready only through current-HEAD final_prepare, and the AC8 repair proves merged predecessors while correctly leaving the final Story and roadmap active before PR delivery closure.
inspection_summary: Inspected every architecture-boundary content-surface input, current review request/plan, core_workflow_state routing, verification evidence, the e7921b85..e7ce2b31 AC8 repair, module imports and action-state transitions, exact-head conformance, and current-head focused E2E and boundary tests. Confirmed connector/review owner reuse, explicit legacy/provider fallback, typed-stop/repair paths, final-prepare Gate binding, and human-only PR create/merge/waiver authority.
inspection_inputs: node --test test/one-command-pr-ready-closure.test.js test/guarded-run-session.test.js --test-name-pattern='head does not advance|review action|final prepare|autonomous|provider fallback|legacy' (85/85 pass on e7ce2b31)
inspection_evidence: .vibepro/qa/review-architecture-boundary-e7ce2b31.json; .vibepro/qa/conformance-e7ce2b31.json; current-head E2E 5/5; current-head focused boundary matrix 85/85
judgment_delta: Initial concern: the AC8 repair might prematurely mark delivery closed or accept Story prose as its own proof -> Final judgment: the executable S-005 fixture now requires Action DAG PR #372, connector PR #377, and review PR #382 as completed predecessor evidence while requiring the final Story and parent roadmap to remain exactly active; current-head E2E passes 5/5.

Initial concern: implementation-head enforcement could distort core_workflow_state or permit stale success -> Final judgment: the production implement owner requires managed HEAD advancement, no-progress is typed and tested, repair rebinds authority, independent review is refreshed, and only final_prepare may return pr_ready after current-HEAD Gate readiness.

Initial concern: the closure owner could reverse the intended dependency direction into the CLI layer -> Final judgment: src/one-command-pr-ready-closure.js imports only node:timers/promises and src/guarded-run-session.js imports run-session/domain modules only; an exact reverse-import search for src/cli.js returns no matches.

Initial concern: the final Story might duplicate Production Runtime Connectors or Independent Review Orchestration -> Final judgment: guarded-run-session composes createProductionRuntimeConnectors and createGuardedIndependentReviewRunner through existing owners, while predecessor Story files remain completed evidence boundaries rather than new duplicate implementations.

Initial concern: AC8's test-only HEAD makes earlier generated evidence stale -> Final judgment: the only e7921b85..e7ce2b31 change is the staged-closure E2E assertion itself; that exact test was rerun on e7ce2b31 and passed 5/5, the current-head unit artifact passes, and exact-head architecture conformance passes with baseline violations reduced 81 to 80 and no new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency.
